title: staelia schumannii
intro: Staelia schumannii, also known as the coral bell, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Staelia schumannii include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations like teas, tinctures, and infusions, often in combination with other medicinal plants.
